sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61557, Lot 25308 — Ancients
John III Ducas-Vatatzes, Empire of Nicaea (AD 1221/2-1254), AV hyperpyron (28mm, 4.59 gm, 5h). NGC MS 4/5 - 3/5, marks, die shift, brushed. Magnesia. IC-XC (barred), Christ seated facing on b
sales.description:
Ancients
John III Ducas-Vatatzes, Empire of Nicaea (AD 1221/2-1254), AV hyperpyron (28mm, 4.59 gm, 5h). NGC MS 4/5 - 3/5, marks, die shift, brushed. Magnesia. IC-XC (barred), Christ seated facing on backless throne, wearing nimbus cruciger with one pellet in each arm, pallium, and colobium, right hand raised in benediction, book of Gospels cradled in left; double border / Iw / ΔЄC/ΠO-T/w / ΠI/Φ/V (T/w ligate), The Virgin, nimbate, standing facing (on right), wearing pallium and maphorium, crow...

sales.description:
JOHN III (OF NICAEA), 1222-1254. AV Hyperpyron (4.17 gms), Magnesia Mint, 1118-1122. NGC Ch AU, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed, Clipped.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1939. Obverse: Christ Pantokrator seated facing on throne; Reverse: John standing facing, wearing loros and holding labarum and globus akakia, being crowned by the Theotokos, nimbate, to right.

From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection. 

Ex: Emporium Hamburg (with tag).

Estimate: 500 - 75...
